name: SSH.NET
description: IMPORTANT: This project is BETA quality.  This project was inspired by Sharp.SSH library which was ported from Java.  This library is a complete rewrite using .NET, without any third party dependencies and to utilize the parallelism as much as possible to allow best performance you can get.  SSH.NET supports .NET 3.5, 4.0, Silverlight, and Windows Phone 7.
